description_long: This object is a rectangular chessboard featuring a classic 8x8 grid of alternating dark and light squares. The surface appears to be made of polished stone or marble, giving it a refined and durable look suitable for both indoor and outdoor urban environments. The squares are evenly sized and arranged in a precise, geometric pattern, with each square sharply delineated from its neighbors. The color palette consists of deep black and light gray, contributing to a high-contrast, visually striking appearance. The board is flat and thin, with no visible raised edges or decorative borders, and the surface finish is smooth and slightly reflective. There are no visible chess pieces or additional markings on the board.
description: A flat, rectangular chessboard with an 8x8 grid of alternating black and light gray squares, made of polished stone or marble. The board is smooth, thin, and lacks any visible border or ornamentation.
description_view_0: The chessboard is seen from a low, angled perspective, highlighting the alternating black and light gray squares and the flat, borderless edges.
description_view_1: This view shows the chessboard from a slightly rotated angle, maintaining the clear visibility of the grid pattern and the smooth, uninterrupted surface.
description_view_2: The board is viewed from another side, with the alternating squares and flat, thin profile remaining prominent and no border details visible.
description_view_3: A final angled view of the chessboard, again emphasizing the regular grid of squares and the absence of any decorative edge or raised border.
attribute_board_pattern: The playing surface features a regular, geometric pattern of 64 squares arranged in an 8x8 grid, with each square alternating between black and light gray. The squares are perfectly aligned and evenly sized, creating a classic chessboard appearance with no decorative or unique elements.
attribute_border_design: The chessboard has no visible border or edge; the playing area extends to the very edge of the board with no additional color, material, ornamentation, or markings.
